title: attribution — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Lifecycle events (identified / converted / churned / merged / reset) fan out to marketing + analytics + notifications. AttributionSuppressedByConsent is the compliance-critical signal — every fire proves the consent gate refused a persistence attempt. AttributionMerged is Enterprise-only (gated by `attribution_merge`). AttributionCampaignRollupComputed is Medium+ (gated by `attribution_rollup`).

events.name: AttributionCreated
events.trigger: AttributionRepository committed a new attributions row. Fires exactly once per (tenant_id, subject_type, subject_id) tuple. First-touch data is populated in the same transaction.

events.name: AttributionUpdated
events.trigger: Umbrella event for scalar-field mutations on the attributions row that are NOT covered by a more specific event (subject_id populate → AttributionSubjectIdentified; lifecycle_state → dedicated events; last_touch_* → AttributionLastTouchUpdated).

events.name: AttributionFirstTouchRecorded
events.trigger: Fires alongside AttributionCreated inside the same afterCommit hook. Distinct event because downstream consumers care specifically about first-touch data for cohort analysis (analytics module) and revenue attribution (finance module Wave 5).

events.name: AttributionLastTouchUpdated
events.trigger: attributions.last_touch_* fields mutated on an existing row. Fires on every attribution-bearing subsequent request (utm_* changed, new click ID, new referrer). Bookend to AttributionFirstTouchRecorded.

events.name: AttributionTouchpointCaptured
events.trigger: AttributionTouchpointObserver committed a new attribution_touchpoints row. Fires exactly once per touchpoint. High-volume event — every attribution-bearing HTTP request produces one.

events.name: AttributionSubjectIdentified
events.trigger: attributions.subject_type transitioned 'anonymous_session' → 'user' | 'athlete' | 'lead'. Fires when an anonymous browser signs up or logs in. This is the pivotal cross-device merge trigger.

events.name: AttributionConverted
events.trigger: attributions.lifecycle_state transitioned 'identified' → 'converted'. Dispatched by a downstream listener when the first purchase / subscription / paid conversion fires (finance module Wave 5 owns the conversion definition).

payload.conversion_source_event: string (fully-qualified event class name that triggered the conversion)

events.name: AttributionChurned
events.trigger: MarkAttributionChurnedJob transitioned lifecycle_state 'anonymous' | 'identified' → 'churned'. Runs nightly. 90-day-inactive threshold.
consumers: notifications::DispatchAttributionChurnDetectedNotification (opt-in to marketing team — batched daily digest)

events.name: AttributionRestored
events.trigger: attributions.lifecycle_state transitioned 'churned' → 'identified' (or 'anonymous' → 'identified' when a churned anonymous re-visits). Fires when a churned subject re-engages via an attribution-bearing request.

events.name: AttributionSessionRefreshed
events.trigger: attributions.current_session_id changed. Fires when a new browser session begins (session cookie rotated / expired). Distinct from AttributionLastTouchUpdated (session refresh may happen without utm change).

events.name: AttributionCampaignRollupComputed
events.trigger: CampaignRollupAggregatorJob completed a rollup pass. Fires hourly per tenant with `attribution_rollup` entitlement.

events.name: AttributionMerged
events.trigger: MergeIdentifiedAttributionsJob completed a merge: N anonymous profiles merged into 1 identified profile. Enterprise-only (gated by `attribution_merge`).

payload.merged_into_attribution_id: ULID (the identified profile that absorbed the others)
payload.first_touch_overwritten: boolean (true when anon profile's first_touch predated identified's)

events.name: AttributionResetRequested
events.trigger: User (or admin on their behalf) invoked POST /api/v1/attributions/{attribution}/reset. Precedes AttributionResetConfirmed by the 90-day audit hold on touchpoint hard-delete.

events.name: AttributionResetConfirmed
events.trigger: Touchpoint purge completed 90 days after AttributionResetRequested. The attributions row's profile fields have been redacted; every associated touchpoint has been hard-deleted.

events.name: AttributionDeleted
events.trigger: attributions.deleted_at set (soft-delete) OR row hard-deleted. Distinct from AttributionReset (reset is user-initiated erasure; delete is admin operational).

events.name: AttributionConsentSnapshotUpdated
events.trigger: attributions.consent_at_capture jsonb mutated. Fires when a subject grants / revokes / adjusts marketing / advertising / personalized_advertising consent categories. Sourced from ConsentUpdated events in the compliance module.

events.name: AttributionTouchpointCountReconciled
events.trigger: ReconcileAttributionCountsJob completed a reconciliation pass. Fires only when a mismatch was found + corrected (touchpoint_count or conversion_touchpoint_count drifted from the actual row count).

events.name: AttributionSuppressedByConsent
events.trigger: AttributionMiddleware attempted to persist an attribution row / touchpoint but ConsentGate::allows('marketing') returned false. Fires per suppressed request. High-volume signal — batched daily by AttributionSuppressedByConsentNotification.

payload.consent_state: object (jsonb — the state that caused refusal)
